sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
turns: So, what kind of music do you enjoy listening to?
I'm a big fan of classic rock and roll. Some of my favorite artists are Led Zeppelin, The Rolling Stones, and AC/DC.
That's cool! I used to listen to a lot of classical music when I was in college, but nowadays I mostly listen to indie pop.
Indie pop, that sounds interesting. Who are some of your favorite indie pop musicians or bands?
Well, I really like the band "Haim".
Haim, huh? I haven't listened to them before, but I'll definitely give them a try.
Yeah, they're a great group. Their songs are really catchy and their live performances are amazing.
Thanks for recommending Haim. I've been looking for new music to discover, and I think I'll enjoy their sound.
You should also check out "Tame Impala" if you like indie pop.
Sure, I'd love to hear more about Tame Impala. How would you describe their sound?
Tame Impala has a unique blend of psychedelic rock and funk, with a modern twist.
That combination of genres sounds intriguing. I'm always on the lookout for new music that can take me on a journey through different styles.
If you're open to exploring other genres, you might want to check out electronic dance music (EDM).
Sure, I'm willing to explore different genres. What would you recommend as good EDM tracks or artists to start with?
For EDM, I suggest starting with artists like The Chemical Brothers or Daft Punk.
Thanks, I'll definitely consider checking out The Chemical Brothers and Daft Punk.
Another artist that I like within the EDM genre is Calvin Harris.
Calvin Harris seems like an interesting choice. Would you say he leans more towards commercial or underground EDM?
Actually, Calvin Harris falls somewhere in between commercial and underground EDM.
No problem, there are plenty of talented underground EDM producers out there who are making incredible music without relying on commercial appeal.
That's fair, I understand where you're coming from. Let's move on to another topic then.
Sure, no problem. How about we talk about our favorite concert experiences? Have you gone to any memorable shows lately?
One of my recent favorites was seeing Foo Fighters at Madison Square Garden.
Wow, that must have been an amazing experience! Which song or moment stood out the most for you during the Foo Fighters show?
One of my recent faves was seeing Radiohead at Barclays Center.
Oh wow, Radiohead at Barclay's Center must have been an unforgettable show.
It definitely was! The way they seamlessly transitioned between old and new songs was impressive, and the energy of the crowd was electric.
That sounds like an incredible experience. I wish I could have been there to see Radiohead perform live.
Yeah, it was truly one of the best concerts I've ever been to.
